paper_metadata.title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity
paper_metadata.abstract: In deep learning, models typically reuse the same parameters for all inputs. Mixture of Experts (MoE) defies this and instead selects different parameters for each incoming example. The result is a sparsely-activated model -- with outrageous numbers of parameters -- but a constant computational cost. However, despite several notable successes of MoE, widespread adoption has been hindered by complexity, communication costs and training instability -- we address these with the Switch Transformer. We simplify the MoE routing algorithm and design intuitive improved models with reduced communication and computational costs. Our proposed training techniques help wrangle the instabilities and we show large sparse models may be trained, for the first time, with lower precision (bfloat16) formats. We design models based off T5-Base and T5-Large to obtain up to 7x increases in pre-training speed with the same computational resources. These improvements extend into multilingual settings where we measure gains over the mT5-Base version across all 101 languages. Finally, we advance the current scale of language models by pre-training up to trillion parameter models on the "Colossal Clean Crawled Corpus" and achieve a 4x speedup over the T5-XXL model.

extraction_data.innovation: Switch Transformer introduces sparse routing with a differentiable load balancing loss to scale to trillion parameter models efficiently. It uses a Transformer architecture with sparse routing and expert selection, enabling balanced computation across multiple experts.
extraction_data.research_problem: Scaling large language models while maintaining efficiency
extraction_data.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

extraction_data.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

extraction_data.innovation: Switch Transformer architecture with sparse expert routing, enabling efficient scaling to trillion parameters while maintaining training stability through selective precision and dropout strategies.
extraction_data.application: Large-scale language modeling, natural language processing tasks.
extraction_data.research_problem: Scaling large language models while maintaining training stability and efficiency.
extraction_data.optimizer: Not explicitly mentioned; assumed default (e.g., Adam or similar).
extraction_data.hardware_used: Not explicitly stated; assumed cloud TPU or similar large-scale hardware.
extraction_data.extension: Selective precision routing (float32 for routing, bfloat16 elsewhere) and expert dropout for fine-tuning stability.
extraction_data.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

extraction_data.innovation: Switch Transformer architecture with sparse expert routing, enabling efficient scaling to large models while maintaining training stability through selective precision and dropout strategies.
extraction_data.application: Large-scale language modeling, natural language processing tasks.

extraction_data.innovation: Switch Transformer architecture with sparse expert routing, enabling efficient scaling to large models while maintaining training stability through selective precision and dropout strategies.

extraction_data.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

extraction_data.innovation: Switch Transformer introduces sparse expert layers to reduce computational cost while maintaining performance. By using sparse experts and distillation techniques, it achieves significant improvements over T5 on multiple tasks while reducing parameters.
extraction_data.finetuning_task: Multi-task fine-tuning for knowledge-based tasks (e.g., SQuAD, WebQuestions, TriviaQA)
extraction_data.extension: Sparse expert layers enable efficient scaling to trillions of parameters with 95% compression while preserving 30% of the quality gain.
extraction_data.research_problem: Scaling large language models to trillion parameters with efficient computation and memory usage
extraction_data.application: Natural language understanding, knowledge-based tasks (e.g., SQuAD, WebQuestions, TriviaQA), reasoning tasks (e.g., SuperGLUE, ANLI)
extraction_data.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

extraction_data.innovation: A smaller sparse model variant of Switch Transformer, achieving 37% of the quality gain of a 7.4B model with 82% compression.
extraction_data.extension: Sparse expert layers enable efficient scaling to trillions of parameters with 82% compression while preserving 37% of the quality gain.
extraction_data.application: Multilingual language modeling, fine-tuning for downstream tasks
extraction_data.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity

extraction_data.innovation: Switch Transformer introduces a sparse mixture of experts (MoE) architecture where parameters are split into experts, enabling efficient scaling to trillion parameters while maintaining computational efficiency. The model dynamically routes tokens to experts based on input features, improving sample efficiency and reducing computational cost.
extraction_data.finetuning_task: Multi-task fine-tuning for knowledge-based tasks (e.g., SQuAD, WebQuestions, TriviaQA)
extraction_data.optimizer: Adam (implied; not explicitly stated in the paper)
extraction_data.hardware_used: NVIDIA A100 GPU (assumed from context of large-scale training)
extraction_data.extension: The Switch Transformer uses a sparse mixture of experts (MoE) architecture to route tokens to experts dynamically, enabling efficient scaling to trillion parameters while reducing computational cost.
extraction_data.research_problem: Scaling large language models to trillion parameters with efficient computation
extraction_data.application: Natural language processing, language modeling, text generation
extraction_data.paper_title: Switch Transformers: Scaling to Trillion Parameter Models with Simple and Efficient Sparsity
